title: CastingCall Live

buildability.reason: Building a live‑video streaming app with real‑time voice recognition and AI answering requires integrating Shopify App Bridge, Shopify Storefront API, Twilio Programmable Video, and OpenAI APIs, which is too complex for a 3‑person team to deliver a production‑ready v1 in 10 weeks.

speedToRevenue.reason: The app would need a subscription or per‑stream fee, but setting up billing, App Store approval, and a quick revenue cycle is difficult for a small team, making first‑cycle paid revenue unlikely.

wedge.reason: Merchants can start a live product stream directly from the Shopify admin and instantly answer shopper questions with AI, eliminating the need for extra staff.

distribution.reason: The App Store can reach many DTC brands, but live‑video shopping is a niche feature that may limit adoption to a subset of merchants, making $50K–$2M reach uncertain.

trapRisk.reason: Realtime voice/video on the product detail page is a high‑risk trap for a 3‑person team due to latency, compliance, and platform limits.

expansion.reason: The product could grow by adding multi‑channel streaming and analytics, but scaling to €1M without pivoting requires significant infrastructure and marketing that a small team may not sustain.

technicalSnapshot: The app will be a Shopify App Bridge extension that injects a live‑video player into the Storefront via the Shopify Storefront API. It will use Twilio Programmable Video for low‑latency streaming, WebRTC for in‑browser playback, and OpenAI’s GPT‑4 for real‑time voice/text Q&A. The backend will run on a serverless platform (e.g., Vercel or Netlify Functions) to handle WebSocket connections, transcription via Whisper, and AI inference, while storing session data in Shopify metafields.

v1Plan.day3: Deploy a minimal Shopify app that registers a custom admin page to start a live stream and embeds a placeholder video player on the storefront.
v1Plan.week3: Implement Twilio video integration, enable real‑time voice transcription, and display AI‑generated answers in the chat overlay.
v1Plan.week10: Add billing via Shopify Billing API, optimize latency, and release the app to the Shopify App Store.

trapNote: Because realtime voice/video on the product page is a high‑risk trap, the team should focus on a simplified chat‑only version or limit streaming to the admin dashboard to reduce complexity.
